title: malus coronaria
intro: Malus coronaria, also known as the Crabapple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The medicinal properties of Malus coronaria include its high concentration of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and tannins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Malus coronaria can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
